## FactoryRunManifestSchema

```json
{
  "$ref": "#/definitions/FactoryRunManifestSchema",
  "definitions": {
    "FactoryRunManifestSchema": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "runId": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "intentId": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "status": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "created",
            "running",
            "cancelling",
            "cancelled",
            "orphaned",
            "blocked",
            "repairing",
            "ready-to-release",
            "completed"
          ]
        },
        "createdAt": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "stages": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
              "stage": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "intent",
                  "planning",
                  "execution",
                  "review",
                  "release"
                ]
              },
              "status": {
                "type": "string",
                "enum": [
                  "pending",
                  "running",
                  "passed",
                  "failed",
                  "skipped"
                ]
              },
              "startedAt": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "completedAt": {
                "type": "string"
              },
              "artifacts": {
                "type": "array",
                "items": {
                  "type": "object",
                  "properties": {
                    "stage": {
                      "$ref": "#/definitions/FactoryRunManifestSchema/properties/stages/items/properties/stage"
                    },
                    "kind": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "minLength": 1
                    },
                    "uri": {
                      "type": "string",
                      "minLength": 1
                    },
                    "sha256": {
                      "type": "string"
                    },
                    "description": {
                      "type": "string"
                    }
                  },
                  "required": [
                    "stage",
                    "kind",
                    "uri"
                  ],
                  "additionalProperties": false
                }
              }
            },
            "required": [
              "stage",
              "status",
              "artifacts"
            ],
            "additionalProperties": false
          }
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "runId",
        "intentId",
        "status",
        "createdAt",
        "stages"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false
    }
  },
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#"
}
```
